steps.action: Prepare the assigned /tmp drift sandbox so shuvbot stays on the newer commit and shuvtest stays on the older commit.
steps.expected: The two SSH hosts expose different HEAD SHAs inside /tmp/shuvdex-user-testing-skill-drift/repo.
steps.observed: Direct SSH verification showed shuvbot HEAD=656c6301a37c41367cee1995d8ad57921a0d003a and shuvtest HEAD=38e5bdbb0ee02734b3cadfa97e8a0aec922ea1d8.

steps.action: Run the public @shuvdex/skill-ops checkDrift API with shuvbot as the reference host.
steps.expected: The drift report includes the reference commit plus per-host HEAD comparison results.
steps.observed: checkDrift returned referenceSha=656c6301a37c41367cee1995d8ad57921a0d003a, shuvbot in_sync at 656c6301a37c41367cee1995d8ad57921a0d003a, and shuvtest drifted at 38e5bdbb0ee02734b3cadfa97e8a0aec922ea1d8.

steps.action: Inspect the checkDrift report for the non-reference host details.
steps.expected: The drifted host is identified with commit SHA, direction, and ahead/behind counts.
steps.observed: shuvtest was reported as status=drifted, sha=38e5bdbb0ee02734b3cadfa97e8a0aec922ea1d8, direction=behind, ahead=0, behind=1.

steps.action: Directly verify HEAD and rev-list counts on both SSH hosts.
steps.expected: shuvbot shows 0 0 and shuvtest shows 1 0 for git rev-list --left-right --count 656c6301a37c41367cee1995d8ad57921a0d003a...HEAD.
steps.observed: Direct SSH/git verification matched the API report: shuvbot returned 0 0 and shuvtest returned 1 0 while shuvtest remained one commit behind the reference.

frictions.description: SSH to shuvtest emitted the known post-quantum warning on stderr during direct verification.
frictions.resolution: Treated it as expected benign stderr per mission guidance and relied on exit status plus stdout evidence for the assertion result.

summary: Retested 2 assertions on the terminal-node-api surface: VAL-SKILL-007 passed and VAL-SKILL-008 passed; 2 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
